title: Tao Te Ching 27
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 27 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 27 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: A good traveler has no fixed plans and is not intent on arriving. A good artist lets intuition lead.
